$comment: Single source of truth for languages supported by the judge. Adding a new language is a 4-step change: append an entry here, drop a runner in judge-service/runners/ (or a compileCmd entry), expose it in the UI dropdown via src/lib/languages.ts, install the toolchain in judge-service/Dockerfile. The Go server today only accepts these languages at runtime — declared but unimplemented entries previously caused user-visible 'Unsupported language' errors. Compiled-language coverage (C/C++/Rust/Java/Kotlin/C#/Swift/PHP/Bash/SQL/TypeScript) is tracked for the registry-driven rewrite scaffolded in languages.go.
